## Source: amazon-inspector (fa75d57475518e4ef5865992ffdf7b0137f3af90a6672bb44113312d6598fe5f)
The package euskalplantxa was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d4a9828262d2d37a526c3f532f4c1306a7f099dc2b229ce8e92694233a3c75a7)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'euskalplantxa' @ 5.8.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
